methodology.interpolation_method: 7.5-8.0 range consistent with confirmed ≥7.5 floor from M2 cross-theme benchmark
methodology.theme_adjustment: dark themes +0.1, light themes -0.1 vs neutral baseline

criteria.name: Visual Hierarchy
criteria.notes: While the comic image itself has a clear internal hierarchy, the slide as a whole lacks visual hierarchy. The image occupies only the left half, leaving a large, undifferentiated dark grey block on the right. There's no clear information flow or emphasis between different slide elements, as there's only one content element (the image) and a lot of empty space.

criteria.name: Whitespace Quality
criteria.notes: There is a significant amount of empty space on the right side of the slide, but it is poorly utilized. It's not 'breathing room' around content elements, but rather a large, unbalanced void that makes the slide appear incomplete or poorly formatted, not contributing to a consistent spacing rhythm.

criteria.name: Color Harmony
criteria.notes: The color palette within the comic image is vibrant and harmonious, featuring warm sunset tones against cool purples and blues. The dark grey empty space on the right is a neutral color that doesn't clash with the image, providing a safe, non-distracting background, although it doesn't actively enhance the overall color harmony of the slide's composition.

criteria.name: Professional Appearance
criteria.notes: The artwork itself is professional and high quality. However, the overall slide composition with the large, blank dark grey area on the right makes the slide look unfinished and unprofessional. It lacks intentional alignment, consistent element sizing across the slide, and would appear out of place in a formal presentation due to its incomplete appearance.
